description: Fixed-scope consulting: diagnostic, recommendation report, and implementation support window.

billableItems.title: Diagnostic phase
billableItems.descriptionHTML: Stakeholder interviews, data review, and context gathering. Week-one goal: we agree on what problem we're really solving before designing the solution.

billableItems.title: Recommendation report + workshop
billableItems.descriptionHTML: Written recommendations with trade-off analysis, a half-day workshop with your leadership team to align on priorities, and a sequenced 90-day plan.

billableItems.title: Implementation support (30 days)
billableItems.descriptionHTML: Weekly 60-minute working sessions, async review of work product, and on-demand Slack access during business hours for 30 days after the workshop.

blocks.textHTML:
Consulting proposal

A focused engagement to diagnose, decide, and execute — no 80-page decks, no endless workshops.

The problem as I understand it

We've talked through where you are and where you want to be. There's a gap, and you don't have the bandwidth internally to close it without pulling attention from the commitments already on your plate. I can absorb that thinking work for you so your team can keep shipping.

How I work

Short diagnostic (two weeks, not two months), one consolidated recommendation with real trade-offs, then a month of elbow-to-elbow support so the recommendations actually land. I deliver in writing — decks are by exception, not default.

What you'll have at the end

  • A clear written diagnosis of the situation
  • A sequenced plan with owner, effort, and expected outcome per step
  • A leadership team aligned on priorities
  • 30 days of implementation pressure so the plan actually starts

Terms

  • Diagnostic paid on engagement start.
  • Recommendation + workshop billed on delivery.
  • Implementation support billed at start of the 30-day window.
  • Everything produced is yours; I retain no rights beyond case-study permission (optional).
